name: Login and create admin user from cross channel
fullName: features/orangehrm_login_admin.feature:Login and create admin user from cross channel

steps.name: Given I am logged into OrangeHRM as admin
When I add a new admin user with username "cross_ops_admin" and password "Admin@123"
Then I should see admin user "cross_ops_admin" in admin list

labels.name: feature
labels.value: Cross Channel OrangeHRM Login And Admin
